summary: Completed the self-contained Orus foundation specification pack for the M0 factory wave. The charter defines measurable M0 scope and the complete M0-M11 milestone roadmap; the glossary standardizes product and engineering terminology; the decision log maps every discovery answer and binding architectural tradeoff with alternatives and validation; the risk register provides concrete mitigations and milestone validation; and SPECS.md indexes all foundation files plus 28 dependency-ordered domain-spec placeholders with the required reusable template. Discovery is closed and no blocking ambiguity remains.
